title: Special Initiatives Pilot Project - Canada.ca
content:
## International Mobility Program: Special initiatives and pilot projects
This section contains policy, procedures and guidance used by IRCC staff. It is posted on the department’s website as a courtesy to stakeholders.

## Provincial and territorial pilot projects
- Atlantic Immigration Pilot Program
- Yukon Community Pilot (YCP)

## Federal pilot projects
- Open work permits for applicants under the Interim Pathway for Caregivers
- Open work permit pilot program for permanent residence applicants in the spouse or common-law partner in Canada class
- Work permits issued to seafood-processing workers
